# CATapDescription | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Audio ](/documentation/coreaudio)

-  CATapDescription 

Class# CATapDescription

iOS 15.0+iPadOS 15.0+Mac Catalyst 15.0+macOS 12.0+

```
class CATapDescription
```

## [Overview](/documentation/coreaudio/catapdescription#overview)

This class describes a tap object that contains an input stream. The input stream is a mix of all of the specified processes output audio.

## [Topics](/documentation/coreaudio/catapdescription#topics)
